ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patient_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename from which the data was collected */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the patient */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error of the data */,
  "mav" REAL /* Mean Absolute Value of the data */,
  "var" REAL /* Variance of the data */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy measure from the data */,
  "mnf" REAL /* Mean Frequency of the data */,
  "mdf" REAL /* Median Frequency of the data */,
  "zc" INTEGER /* Zero Crossings in the data */,
  "fr" REAL /* Frequency response of the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the medical device used to collect the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., ECG, EEG, blood pressure monitor) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data collection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for an emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Patient's blood type */,
  "height" REAL /* Patient's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Patient's weight in kilograms */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Patient's insurance ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., RMSE, MAV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "range" TEXT /* Normal range for the measurement */,
  "critical_values" TEXT /* Values that indicate a critical condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the healthcare system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's login session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES patient_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data analyzed */,
  "summary_statistics" TEXT /* Summary of the statistical analysis */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical analysis performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "reviewed_by" TEXT /* User who reviewed the analysis */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES patient_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial */,
  "patient_count" INTEGER /* Number of patients enrolled in the trial */,
  "trial_location" TEXT /* Location where the trial is being conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "send_by" TEXT /* User who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
